betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Infernal Coal§f

§aNether-exclusive ore that burns 3× longer than regular coal.§f

Found in the Nether at any y-level. Mined with any pickaxe.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Fuel§f: 4,800 ticks (240s) — smelts 24 blocks. 3× coal.
§b• Solid Fuel§f: Infernal Coal + 500 mB H₂O₂ in Chemical Plant.
§b• Coal Powder§f: Shred Infernal Coal.

§cDanger§f: Mining the ore releases Monoxide gas. You need a Catalytic or Combo filter in your gas mask (see Gas Masks quest). Hazmat alone won't block CO.

§eTip§f: Infernal Coal is your best early fuel source for the Blast Furnace. Stock up before scaling steel production.
